title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TVS Supply Chain Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TVS Supply Chain Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
